metadata.title: We Don't Talk Anymore (12" Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:28.86] It's so funny
[00:30.47] How we don't talk anymore
[00:36.91] 
[00:39.97] We don't talk
[00:45.03] Used to think that life was sweet
[00:49.90] Used to think we were so complete
[00:54.03] I can't believe you'd throw it away
[01:00.32] 
[01:03.20] Used to feel we had it made
[01:07.22] Used to feel we could sail away
[01:11.23] Can you imagine how I feel today?
[01:18.74] Well, it seems a long time ago you were the lonely one
[01:27.94] Now it comes to letting go you are the only one
[01:36.01] Do you know what you've done?
[01:41.16] It's so funny how we don't talk anymore
[01:49.88] It's so funny why we don't talk anymore
[01:57.06] But I ain't losing sleep and I ain't counting sheep
[02:07.09] It's so funny how we don't talk anymore
[02:16.62] 
[02:21.07] We don't talk
[02:34.15] Well, it really doesn't matter to me
[02:38.88] I guess you're leaving was meant to be
[02:43.14] It's down to you now; you want to be free
[02:50.72] Well, I hope you know which way to go
[02:54.72] You're on your own again
[02:59.88] Don't come crying to me
[03:02.37] When you're the lonely one
[03:06.64] Remember what you've done
[03:12.86] It's so funny how we don't talk anymore
[03:20.35] It's so funny why we don't talk anymore
[03:28.94] But I ain't losing sleep
[03:33.10] And I ain't counting sheep, no, no, no
[03:37.66] It's so funny how we don't talk anymore
[03:47.13]

[04:25.28] No, I ain't counting sheep, no, no, no, no
[04:30.81] It's so funny how we don't talk anymore
[04:47.74] Well, it really doesn't matter to me
[04:52.33] I guess you're leaving was meant to be
[04:56.71] It's down to you now; you want to be free
[05:04.46] Well, I hope you know which way to go

[05:13.45] Don't come crying to me
